textByHash.284053a25c7c16c6b2af28110e463ec6f016c971: Brrr, blimey it's cold up here! Wish I had something nice to drink to chase away these chills!
textByHash.17df85549ff233bc08b7d7a8c5fc3d31ca1851e0: Ohhh! Many thanks! Brrr, blimey it's cold up here!
textByHash.564c99c9cbdb81ac53088f248f812196f31eea00: Blimey, it was certainly jolly decent of that old stick Sanfew to get you to make me a cup of herbal tea. Wow! It really does chase away the chills!
textByHash.b9fb802da69daad348128d94864855b09fdf4d39: Hmmm, well I guess they're just like overgrown gnomes when you think about it!
textByHash.3de30df236774a0db571022198d2d4fbc290ac13: Quite! Anyway, go on! What was Sanfew after?
textByHash.c7df195f1fc8538397bbf8bde57d4e1f18131c38: Yes, quite, but who amongst us does? I know I'm often confused by that beardy bunch of yakking druids.
textByHash.045a6a5bc699192cc0bc7d1e43767e8107b2ed7c: Hmm, interesting! I know that the elders want to extend the network of glider routes, and I did hear that the Feldip Hills were being considered. I don't know why it hasn't opened up yet though.
textByHash.e6dde19930feb8442f855a75a9221ec2270c1cb5: If I'm going to transport that yakking druid down to the ogres I'll want to make it in record time so I'll need some lighter kit.
textByHash.fe6dc3a356b4aba3ebcb88bc9bcf800055df5ad2: There's a chap called Arhein in Catherby and I've heard that his special interest in ships has helped him to produce lightweight but strengthened ropes. I'm in need of some T.R.A.S.H.! And I need you to get it for me.
textByHash.12170aca8c8af4f517af8087e9407806cdb62b55: I'm talking about the next generation of lightweight ropes. Triple Redundant Aero Super Hawser...T.R.A.S.H.! I'll transport your yakking druid if you can get me some T.R.A.S.H!
textByHash.b6535883ec68756a1fbb62e0995ee027853ead3d: And you have to get it because I have to stay here with this glider. Is it a deal?
textByHash.f2e261cf389d3e54b1790698b96579991a518b8f: Go to Arhein and ask him for some T.R.A.S.H....
textByHash.9dd3860002efb1438890123975c2a969edaf1cf4: T.R.A.S.H. is a short way of saying, 'Triple Redundant Aero Super Hawser', it's a technical term that we gnomes like to use when specifying lightweight rope.
textByHash.1c2248b66785cf09413751afa5567331cfab7467: Go and talk to a chap called Arhein in Catherby, he's developed it so he'll know exactly what you're talking about.
textByHash.935234c38015b6853466fd5b34f5b95e804eceb5: Well, that's a bit of a shame...I was looking forward to upgrading my glider!
textByHash.e2bcc364d8b12308230630f6b58f90bc0315749f: Go to Arhein in Catherby and get some T.R.A.S.H! That's a short name for Triple Redundant Aero Super Hawser and then bring it back to me! I mean, it's not difficult is it?
textByHash.5d6e1c5e5a1aaaa615c3f26b6734b4a54b3693cf: Oh, yes, thanks...I've already installed it. I should go like the wind now! Tell Sanfew, that yakking old druid, I'll be happy to take him to the ogre area now...and yourself of course if you should like to go.
textByHash.914d8a69564573197b631ae6365226a1bb3f561d: Gnome Air is the finest airline in Gielinor!
textByHash.87e27bfa2170d19354af5a1d5b9f8b8c79a03636: Well...it's the only real airline in Gielinor.
textByHash.bc3a099725822c0ae5865e7a0076ddca5d4be036: Well there's a dodgy magic carpet operation in the desert, I doubt it will ever take off... Ha!
textByHash.0757989559b01fb30c2c77756dc4ad248ddbdda8: Glough has ordered that I only take gnomes on Gnome Air.
textByHash.d61c92b63ccccff60fe334fb5ae82c66b493b113: I would, but Glough has told me not to take humans on Gnome Air.
textByHash.2894fc67a0b16bb9c889fca4de0925552bc476f6: Oh we have a whole network! It's wonderful for getting to hard to reach places.
textByHash.1b4be51dc9c4b6c853701b95e390090dafeea7e8: There are so many places where your teleports cannot reach!
textByHash.1928d5e39b9cd3b5a191444e707e30c0183758a4: I think you'll find that is a gnome trade secret!
textByHash.0f79ba89edb5f81ce9becd9869c7d0717770f415: Aahh, the smell of home, there's nothing like it. Thanks.
textByHash.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
textByHash.bb6c406a0fce6108aa48f8094eb5fe1a1335fdf4: Please finish the puzzle for me!
